name: Chili Cheese Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the cheese is at room temperature. Mix the American and cream cheeses until well blended.
2. Stir in the garlic powder and chopped pecans.
3. Form the mixture into a roll about 10 inches long.
4. Spread the chili powder on waxed paper.
5. Roll the cheese over the waxed paper, coating the outside with the chili powder.
6. Chill the roll until ready to serve.
7. Slice and serve with crackers or Melba toast. Makes forty 1/4 inch thick slices.
Origin: Spices of the World Cookbook, by McCormick.
